Renting

  • Home
  • /
  • Services
  • /
  • Renting

The right rent, without the stress.

Whether you're looking for a home or a commercial space to rent, or you want to let out your own property, we handle the process from the first viewing to the signing of the tenancy agreement.

For tenants.

  • A shortlist of properties that match what you're after
  • Well-organised viewings, with no time wasted
  • Clear tenancy terms, with no surprises

For landlords.

  • The right rent based on the local market
  • Referencing and selection of reliable tenants
  • Full preparation and signing of the tenancy agreement

Frequently asked questions.

For the tenancy agreement you'll need the basic details of both parties (ID and tax number) and the property's Energy Performance Certificate. We guide you step by step through everything.

It depends on the price and condition of the property. With the right pricing and marketing, most properties let within a few weeks.

The fee is agreed clearly from the outset, before any work begins. No hidden charges.
